nasb.text: You shall offer a burnt offering for a soothing aroma to the Lord: two young bulls, one ram, seven male lambs one year old;

esv.text: but offer a burnt offering, with a pleasing aroma to the Lord: two bulls from the herd, one ram, seven male lambs a year old;

cnv.text: 只要把燔祭作為馨香的祭獻給耶和華，就是兩頭公牛犢、一隻公綿羊、七隻一歲的公羊羔。

ccb.text: 你们要把两头公牛犊、一只公绵羊和七只一岁的公羊羔献给耶和华作馨香的燔祭。
